productDisplayName: Newhide Black Unisex Casual Passport Holder
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this passport holder from Newhide is an essential to stay organised during travel. Ensure all your important items are organised and arranged in this piece. Newhide leather breathes, regulates temperature to the ambience, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance. Carry your essentials with ease in this classic holder.Dimensions: 23 cm X 12 cmWarranty: 1 yearTwo tone leather upper with a flap-and-loopnbsp; closureOne id holder and two card holders on the left and two id holders and four card holders on the right A zippered pocket and a pen holder in the centreCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
